lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜੋ ਚਲੈ ਤਿਪਤਾਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kai bhaanai jo chalai tipataasai har gun gaae |
lines.english: Whoever walks in harmony with the Will of the True Guru, and sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, is pleasing to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ਹੈ ਕਿਤੁ ਖਾਧੈ ਤਿਪਤਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har prabh veparavaahu hai kit khaadhai tipataae |
lines.english: My Lord God is Self-existent and Independent. What does He need to eat to be satisfied?

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਕਲਜੁਗਿ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿ ਚਲੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan kalajug naanakaa ji chale satigur bhaae |12|
lines.english: Blessed, blessed are they, in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, O Nanak, who walk in harmony with the Will of the True Guru. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਨ ਸੇਵਿਓ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਰਖਿਓ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: satiguroo na sevio sabad na rakhio ur dhaar |
lines.english: Those who do not serve the True Guru, and do not keep the Shabad enshrined in their hearts

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਭਉ ਮਨਿ ਪਵੈ ਤਾਂ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee bhau man pavai taan har ras lagai piaar |
lines.english: If one follows the Guru's Teachings, and keeps the Fear of God in his mind, then he is lovingly attuned to the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਿਗੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਕਾ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਕਿਤੁ ਆਏ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: dhig tinaa kaa jeeviaa kit aae sansaar |
lines.english: cursed are their lives. Why did they even come into the world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਮਿਲੈ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰਿ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naau milai dhur likhiaa jan naanak paar utaar |13|
lines.english: By his primal destiny, he obtains the Name; O Nanak, he is carried across. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਜਗੁ ਭਰਮਿਆ ਘਰੁ ਮੁਸੈ ਖਬਰਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohi jag bharamiaa ghar musai khabar na hoe |
lines.english: The world wanders lost in emotional attachment to Maya; it does not realize that its own home is being plundered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਮਨੁ ਹਿਰਿ ਲਇਆ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਧਾ ਲੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh man hir leaa manamukh andhaa loe |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is blind in the world; his mind is lured away by sexual desire and anger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਖੜਗ ਪੰਚ ਦੂਤ ਸੰਘਾਰੇ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਜਾਗੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: giaan kharrag panch doot sanghaare guramat jaagai soe |
lines.english: With the sword of spiritual wisdom, kill the five demons. Remain awake and aware to the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਰਤਨੁ ਪਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam ratan paragaasiaa man tan niramal hoe |
lines.english: The Jewel of the Naam is revealed, and the mind and body are purified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਹੀਨ ਨਕਟੇ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਬਹਿ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naamaheen nakatte fireh bin naavai beh roe |
lines.english: Those who lack the Naam wander around lost, with their noses cut off; without the Name, they sit and cry.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੁ ਮੇਟਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak jo dhur karatai likhiaa su mett na sakai koe |14|
lines.english: O Nanak, no one can erase that which is pre-ordained by the Creator Lord. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਖਟਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukhaa har dhan khattiaa gur kai sabad veechaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs earn the wealth of the Lord, contemplating the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਤੁਟ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: naam padaarath paaeaa atutt bhare bhanddaar |
lines.english: They receive the wealth of the Naam; their treasures are overflowing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਬਾਣੀ ਉਚਰਹਿ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har gun baanee uchareh ant na paaraavaar |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Bani, they utter the Glorious Praises of the Lord, whose end and limitations cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਭ ਕਾਰਣ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੈ ਵੇਖੈ ਸਿਰਜਨਹਾਰੁ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak sabh kaaran karataa karai vekhai sirajanahaar |15|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Creator is the Doer of all; the Creator Lord beholds all. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਹਜੁ ਹੈ ਮਨੁ ਚੜਿਆ ਦਸਵੈ ਆਕਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh antar sehaj hai man charriaa dasavai aakaas |
lines.english: Within the Gurmukh is intuitive peace and poise; his mind ascends to the Tenth Plane of the Akaashic Ethers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਊਂਘ ਨ ਭੁਖ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਖ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: tithai aoongh na bhukh hai har amrit naam sukh vaas |
lines.english: No one is sleepy or hungry there; they dwell in the peace of the Ambrosial Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਿਆਪਤ ਨਹੀ ਜਿਥੈ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: naanak dukh sukh viaapat nahee jithai aatam raam pragaas |16|
lines.english: O Nanak, pain and pleasure do not afflict anyone, where the Light of the Lord, the Supreme Soul, illuminates. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਕਾ ਚੋਲੜਾ ਸਭ ਗਲਿ ਆਏ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh kaa cholarraa sabh gal aae paae |
lines.english: All have come, wearing the robes of sexual desire and anger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਉਪਜਹਿ ਇਕਿ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਂਹਿ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik upajeh ik binas jaanhi hukame aavai jaae |
lines.english: Some are born, and some pass away. They come and go according to the Hukam of the Lord's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਚੁਕਈ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਗਾ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaman maran na chukee rang lagaa doojai bhaae |
lines.english: Their comings and goings in reincarnation do not end; they are imbued with the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀਅਨੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau kirapaa dhaareean tinaa satigur miliaa aae |
lines.english: Those, upon whom the Lord showers His Mercy, come and meet the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨਿ ਬੰਧਿ ਭਵਾਈਅਨੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: bandhan bandh bhavaaeean karanaa kachhoo na jaae |17|
lines.english: Bound in bondage, they are made to wander, and they cannot do anything about it. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਉਲਟੀ ਭਈ ਮਰਿ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur mile ulattee bhee mar jeeviaa sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, they turn away from the world; they remain dead while still alive, with intuitive peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naanak bhagatee ratiaa har har naam samaae |18|
lines.english: O Nanak, the devotees are imbued with the Lord; they are absorbed in the Name of the Lord. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਚੰਚਲ ਮਤਿ ਹੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh chanchal mat hai antar bahut chaturaaee |
lines.english: The intellect of the self-willed manmukh is fickle; he is very tricky and clever within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਕਰਤਿਆ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਗਇਆ ਇਕੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: keetaa karatiaa birathaa geaa ik til thaae na paaee |
lines.english: Whatever he has done, and all that he does, is useless. Not even an iota of it is acceptable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁੰਨ ਦਾਨੁ ਜੋ ਬੀਜਦੇ ਸਭ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਕੈ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: pun daan jo beejade sabh dharam raae kai jaaee |
lines.english: The charity and generosity he pretends to give will be judged by the Righteous Judge of Dharma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਬਨੁ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਜਰੁ ਪਹੁਚੈ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: joban jaandaa nadar na aavee jar pahuchai mar jaaee |
lines.english: Youth slips away imperceptibly, old age comes, and then he dies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਛੋਡਈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin satiguroo jamakaal na chhoddee doojai bhaae khuaaee |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, the Messenger of Death does not leave the mortal alone; he is ruined by the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਸੋ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਨਾਉ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seve so sukh paae naau vasai man aaee |
lines.english: Whoever serves the True Guru finds peace; the Name comes to abide in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤੁ ਕਲਤੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਹੇਤੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਤਿ ਬੇਲੀ ਕੋ ਨ ਸਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: put kalat mohu het hai ant belee ko na sakhaaee |
lines.english: The mortal is caught in love and emotional attachment to children and spouse, but none of them will be his helper and support in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਨੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਦੁਖ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh naam na chetanee bin naavai dukh roe |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not even think of the Name; without the Name, they cry in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਵਡੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਜਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: naanak se vadde vaddabhaagee ji guramukh naam samaaee |19|
lines.english: O Nanak, great and very fortunate are those who, as Gurmukh, are absorbed in the Naam. ||19||
